title: dianthus fragrans
intro: Dianthus fragrans, a fragrant-flowering plant in the carnation family, is a type of perennial herb known for its fragrant foliage and flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Dianthus fragrans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for colds, sore throats, and other respiratory problems.
